title: tectaria chrysotricha
intro: Tectaria chrysotricha, also known as the Golden Hair Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tectaria chrysotricha include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestive health. Tectaria chrysotricha can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves can be used to make a decoction, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
